subcodes.title: Words spoken ca. Nov. 1921 in Haifa
subcodes.first_line: What bounty is greater than the joy of the beloved ones! Man must either be the bestower or the recipient thereof [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: چه موهبتی اعظم از سرور احباست انسان باید یا فائض باشد یا مستفیض
subcodes.subjects: @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @praise and encouragement
